en: What are you guys up to this weekend?
I am taking my fiancee apple picking.
Really excited. Ah, the old ball and chain. Lovely.
ko: 진짜 기대돼. 아, 족쇄 차인 몸이구나. 좋겠다.

en: Meanwhile, I'm over here going on a date with my Netflix account.
ko: 그 사이 나는 Netflix 계정이랑 데이트야.

en: Oh, my God.
You Ben Marshall take Ozark season four as your lawfully wedded wife?
ko: Ben Marshall, 오자크 시즌 4를 합법적인 아내로 맞이하시겠습니까?

en: I do, I do. It's just a joke. Yeah, no.
All kidding aside, you'll find someone.
ko: 농담은 그만하고, 넌 누군가를 만날 거야.

en: You're a great guy. Oh, thank you.
Here's to hoping.
Three normal goth guys, not a single weird thing about them.
ko: 세 명의 평범한 고스 남자, 이상한 점은 하나도 없어.

en: Living their lives from day-to-day in a totally regular way.
Three normal goths.
Pizza time.
Oh, yeah. Okay.
Pizza and nachos? Am I adulting right? Treat yourself.
ko: 피자랑 나초? 나 어른 노릇 잘하는 거지? 자기 자신에게 보상해.

en: Uh-huh. Hey, guys, I want abs.
ko: 응. 야, 얘들아, 나 복근 갖고 싶어.

en: I really do, but I want pizza more.
ko: 진짜로, 근데 피자가 더 먹고 싶어.

en: They're three normal guys with conventional taste.
ko: 평범한 취향을 가진 세 명의 보통 남자.

en: Three normal goths.
You know who's just, like, hilarious?
Peter Griffin. Yep.
They use the normal people bathroom and they try to stay in very good shape.
ko: 일반인 화장실을 쓰고, 몸매 관리를 열심히 하려고 해.

en: FML? The Beatles aren't on Spotify?
Those rat bastards?
They'll pay for what they did.
Sometimes the jokes don't land.
Knock, knock. Hey!
What? I'm here with my three favorite co-workers.
ko: 뭐? 내가 제일 좋아하는 동료 세 명이랑 있어.

en: Oh, God. Will you stop that?
Anyway, I'll leave you to it.
Have a good one. See ya. Bye.
Can we talk about that hat?
Oh, my God.
I was gonna say. Who are you calling?
I don't even want to say. Who are you calling?
Fashion police. Oh, no.
Oh, my God. You're bad.
They're surprisingly judgy when it comes to other people's fashion choices.
ko: 다른 사람 패션에 대해서는 의외로 잔소리가 심해.

en: Hey, John. Mm-hmm?
Did you...
What? Did you change something?
Oh, yeah.
I tattooed my eyeballs. Oh!
Yeah, we're just spicing it up for the summertime.
ko: 오! 응, 여름이라 좀 변화를 줘봤어.

en: He made his eyes black for the summertime.
Remember Cancun?
Yep. It was loco.
Honestly, the whole time I was kind of like, I miss my doggo. Oh, buster.
ko: 솔직히 내내 내 강아지가 보고 싶었어. 아, Buster.

en: They've got homo, got dogs, and got kids, too.
ko: 집도 있고, 강아지도 있고, 아이들도 있어.

en: They also happen to be Disney adults.
Three normal guys. That's right.
